description_long: This is a rectangular, vintage-style briefcase with a dark brown leather exterior, featuring visible metal rivets reinforcing each corner. The surface has a slightly worn, matte finish, giving it a classic and durable appearance. The front side is equipped with two metallic latches and a central, arched handle made of leather or a similar material, attached with metal brackets. The edges and corners are further protected by rounded metal plates, each secured with multiple rivets. The briefcase appears solid and sturdy, suitable for carrying documents or personal items. No external pockets, logos, or decorative elements are visible, emphasizing its utilitarian design.
description: A vintage brown leather briefcase with metal corner reinforcements, dual latches, and a central handle. The design is sturdy, simple, and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle, two metal latches, and reinforced corners with rivets.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness, corner reinforcements, and absence of handles or latches.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a plain surface with reinforced corners and no visible handle or latches.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the briefcase's depth and corner details.
attribute_handle_type: Single central arched handle, likely leather-wrapped, attached with metal brackets, fixed and flexible.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Two metal latches on the front, likely snap or clasp type, no visible key or combination lock.
attribute_corner_reinforcements: Rounded metal plates with rivets on all eight corners, providing robust protection.
